$comment: Spec pin for the regression baseline. The pipeline-snapshot.json was captured against the upstream spec content fingerprinted by `expectedSpecHash`. `specRef` MUST be a full 40-char commit SHA on camunda/camunda (not a branch like `main`) so the baseline does not drift on every upstream merge. CI fetches the spec at `specRef` (requires camunda-schema-bundler >= 2.1.0 for SHA support) and aborts early if its hash drifts, so reviewers see a clear 'spec changed upstream — re-pin' signal instead of an opaque snapshot diff. To bump: pick a newer SHA, run `SPEC_REF=<sha> npm run fetch-spec:ref && npm run snapshot:update`, then update both fields below in the same PR.
